sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36174" key="e)ntafieu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐντᾰφ-ιεύω</orth>, <sense id="n36174.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ιάζω</ref></xr>, Charis.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,SB:volume=3:p.566K" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.566K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
